tools.name: weather_api
tools.description: Get current weather and short-range forecasts for a city.

tools.name: news_search
tools.description: Search recent news articles about a topic, company, or person.

tools.name: stock_quote
tools.description: Get the latest market price for a stock ticker.

tools.name: currency_converter
tools.description: Convert money between currencies using recent FX rates.

tools.name: flight_search
tools.description: Search available flights between two cities on a given date.
examples: flight from London to Berlin tomorrow

tools.name: hotel_search
tools.description: Find hotels in a city for a date range and guest count.
examples: stay in Rome from May 3 to May 5

tools.name: calendar_create
tools.description: Create a calendar event with title, date, and time.
examples: schedule budget review next Tuesday at 3pm

tools.name: calendar_lookup
tools.description: Look up existing calendar events for a day.
examples: what is on my calendar Friday

tools.name: email_send
tools.description: Send an email to one or more recipients.
examples: email the product team a launch update

tools.name: docs_search
tools.description: Search product or API documentation for a topic or keyword.

tools.name: issue_tracker
tools.description: Search repository issues by assignee, status, or keyword.
examples: open issues assigned to Alice in ToolScout

tools.name: repo_search
tools.description: Search source code repositories for files, symbols, or text.

tools.name: customer_lookup
tools.description: Retrieve customer profile information from a CRM.

tools.name: database_query
tools.description: Run an analytical SQL query against a warehouse.
examples: top customers by revenue last quarter

tools.name: wiki_search
tools.description: Search a company or public knowledge base for background information.

tools.name: package_tracker
tools.description: Track the shipment status of a package by tracking number.

tools.name: social_listen
tools.description: Search social media posts for a brand, topic, or trend.
examples: recent Reddit posts about electric cars

tools.name: sentiment_analyzer
tools.description: Score text or document collections for sentiment.

tools.name: translation_service
tools.description: Translate text between languages.

tools.name: image_generator
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt.

tools.name: meeting_transcriber
tools.description: Transcribe and summarize audio recordings of meetings.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Run a broad web search across the public internet.

tools.name: maps_route
tools.description: Compute driving or walking directions between two locations.

tools.name: task_manager
tools.description: Create and update tasks in a personal task system.
examples: add buy groceries to my todo list
create a task to review the PR

queries.query: book a flight from London to Berlin next Monday
schedule budget review next Tuesday at 3pm
what meetings do I have on Friday
find open issues assigned to Alice in ToolScout
show recent Reddit posts about electric cars
